hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects fragmented provider alerts into unified case workflows to reduce manual handoffs and strengthen audit-ready evidence in compliance operations.

problem_title: Manual alert handoffs slow compliance reviews
problem_description: Compliance teams spend excessive time transferring alerts into case management systems manually, creating operational delays and increasing the risk of errors. This fragmented process weakens audit readiness and limits clear traceability of compliance decisions across workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects alert data, provider outputs and reviewer actions into a single case management workflow that reduces manual handoffs and preserves audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: Alerts move into structured case workflows
workflow_description: SFTY routes incoming alerts through review, escalation, case creation and decision logging to build clear and auditable case evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY help reduce manual handoffs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects fragmented provider alerts into structured case workflows, reducing manual copying and review handoffs for compliance teams in regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How are alerts routed into case workflows?
faq_2_answer: Alerts from multiple providers are automatically routed by SFTY into review queues and case management systems based on internal rules and risk thresholds.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs, and linked evidence packages to support audit readiness and regulatory review without altering original provider data.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates as a compliance control layer that integrates outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, and other providers into one connected workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, or other providers but organizes their outputs into structured workflows and audit-ready compliance records.
final_title: Connect alerts into structured case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY routes provider alerts into audit-ready cases with decision logs and controlled compliance handoffs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
